DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT AWELL LOGISTICS GROUP'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF GAO'S ATTENDANCE OF DEPOSITION; AND FOR SANCTIONS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MUST APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION IN SAN FRANCISCO BY NOVEMBER 4, 2011. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, HOWEVER MAY BE RENEWED IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO APPEAR AT DEPOSITION BY 11/4/11. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; NOT REPORTED
